underlying_goal: Set up a full two-way voice interaction system with Claude Code including TTS output, speech-to-text input via push-to-talk, and autostart configuration
friction_detail: Audio playback failed initially due to raw vs MP3 format mismatch, push-to-talk IPC didn't work due to separate processes not sharing state, and ffmpeg dependency issues required workarounds.
brief_summary: User wanted a full voice interaction loop (TTS + STT + push-to-talk) for Claude Code; system was built and mostly working after several rounds of debugging audio, IPC, and dependency issues.
